buttons.primary: bg-[#C41E3A] text-white hover:bg-[#A01830] transition-colors border border-transparent shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#D4AF37] text-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#D4AF37]/10 transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-black/50 border border-white/20 text-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#C41E3A] focus:border-transparent

cards.default: bg-[#161618] border border-white/10 p-6 rounded-sm hover:border-[#D4AF37]/50 transition-colors

animation_and_motion.battle_resolution: flash effect, shake on combat tokens, high impact

login_background.description: A man kneels with swords in a dramatic pose - dark cinematic background for login screen.

lobby_background.description: A white japanese castle against a blue sky. Add a heavy dark overlay (bg-black/70) when using this image.

game_board_texture.description: Dark parchment paper texture for the game board background and territory cards.

icons.usage: Use sharp, distinct icons for combat (swords, shields), honor (star/medal), provinces (map-pin). Size generally 16px to 24px.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the main Game Board map container to allow absolute positioning of tokens on the 3737x2313 board image (scale accordingly using aspect ratios).
The UI is 'Control Room' mode during gameplay: dense grids, dark panels, minimal gaps (gap-4). Everything must fit on screen or use localized scrolling inside panels.
For the Login and Lobby, use generous spacing (Tetris Mode) with glassmorphic cards (bg-[#161618]/70 backdrop-blur-xl) over the dramatic samurai/castle backgrounds.
Implement 'data-testid' on ALL interactive elements (tokens, cards, board regions, buttons) for robust testing.
Headings MUST use 'Cinzel' font. Body must use 'Manrope' font. Do not use Inter or generic sans.
Rely heavily on high contrast. Important gameplay actions (Place Token, Resolve Battle) should use the Primary color (#C41E3A). Neutral actions use the Secondary Gold (#D4AF37).
Round tracker should visually distinct active phase using text glow or prominent #D4AF37 border.
